personal.name: Alex Mercer
personal.title: Full Stack Developer & Creative Engineer
personal.bio: I build digital experiences that live at the intersection of code and creativity. With 5+ years of crafting scalable web applications, I turn complex problems into elegant, user-centric solutions. When I'm not debugging production issues at 2 AM, I'm exploring generative art and open-source tooling.

projects.title: NeuralHub
projects.description: A collaborative ML model repository with real-time training dashboards, version control for datasets, and one-click deployment pipelines to major cloud providers.

projects.title: FlowBoard
projects.description: Real-time Kanban and sprint planning tool with AI-powered task prioritization, burndown analytics, and Slack/GitHub integrations used by 500+ teams.

projects.title: EchoAPI
projects.description: An open-source API mocking and testing platform supporting REST, GraphQL, and gRPC with a visual contract editor and CI/CD webhook triggers.

projects.title: Luminary CMS
projects.description: Headless CMS with a visual block editor, multi-language support, and an edge-cached delivery layer that serves 50M+ content requests per month.

experience.description: Lead a cross-functional team of 8 engineers building a B2B SaaS analytics platform. Reduced API response times by 60% through query optimization and Redis caching. Introduced TypeScript across the entire frontend codebase, cutting production bugs by 35%.

Built and maintained React micro-frontends serving 2M+ monthly active users. Architected the real-time notification system using WebSockets and BullMQ. Mentored 4 junior engineers on code quality and system design principles.

Developed responsive marketing sites and e-commerce storefronts for 20+ clients. Integrated third-party payment gateways and shipping APIs. Improved Core Web Vitals scores by an average of 40 points across client sites.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.text: Alex is the rare engineer who can architect a system at 9 AM and ship a pixel-perfect UI by 5 PM. Their technical depth combined with product empathy makes them invaluable on any team.

testimonials.name: Marcus Rivera
testimonials.text: Working with Alex elevated our entire team. They brought structure to our chaotic codebase, introduced testing culture, and always found time to mentor others without sacrificing velocity.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.text: Alex translates ambiguous product requirements into clean, maintainable code better than anyone I've worked with. Clients consistently praised the quality and speed of their deliveries.
